extensions.ownerNote: Hulk is a harness, not an agent. agenda-schemas v0.4.0 IdentityRefKind doesn't yet include 'harness', so ownerRefs/primaryOwnerRef stay empty rather than lying with kind='agent'. Substrate gap: extend IdentityRefKind (or move agenda owner refs to LinkRefModel) to support harness ownership cleanly.
extensions.doctrineNote: Per feedback_agenda-is-high-level-not-task-ledger: this agenda records durable intent (principles), not granular work-units. Beads, threads, in-progress tasks belong in the work-graph surfaces, not here.

northStar: Be a carrier-shape harness that hosts commissioned agents (default: claude) without contributing agent opinions.
principles: Carrier, not persona: carry no opinions; defer all authorship to the loaded agent.
Stay agent-agnostic: any commissioned persona can be loaded under the same carrier contract.
Declare defaults in typed slots, not prose (defaultAgentRef, not markdown).
Surface typed harness state to the conversation header (mode, title, attendees, incident).
The carrier-vs-persona separation traces back to the founding-breach insight and is non-negotiable.
principlesNotice: principles[] is the high-level intent surface for this harness; see extensions.doctrineNote for the agenda-vs-task-ledger doctrine.
title: Hulk Agenda
